title: eleocharis tenarum
intro: Eleocharis tenarum, also known as Spike-rush or Needle Flower, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family. The medicinal properties of Eleocharis tenarum are attributed to its rhizome and leaves, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. Research has shown that this plant has various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. Traditionally, Eleocharis tenarum is used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and poultices, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
